name: outcomeloop
description: Keep Codex working until external evidence proves the outcome.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex until an external verifier passes.
interface.longDescription: OutcomeLoop resumes GPT-5.6 Codex sessions after premature stops and accepts completion only when a deterministic verifier succeeds.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OutcomeLoop to turn this goal into a verified completion contract and keep working until it passes.
